name: Quote Knowledge Graph

formData.dct:title: Quote Knowledge Graph
formData.dct:description: QuoteKG is a large-scale multilingual knowledge graph of quotations, designed to capture and link quotes from public figures across different languages, contexts, and sources.

aiSuggestions.mod:sampleQueries: • SELECT ?Person (COUNT(?quote) AS ?NumberOfQuotes) WHERE {?quote a so:Quotation ;so:spokenByCharacter [ skos:prefLabel ?Person ] .} GROUP BY ?Person ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?quote)
